summary: Closed MN subsystem split PR from #2617. The loaded changed-file metadata and raw diff show a small code-matching/naming-oriented edit in src/melee/mn/mnmain.c: one argument in fn_8022AFEC was changed from mn_804A04F0.prev_menu to data->hovered_selection, and local declaration order in mn_8022B3A0 was adjusted, including moving StaticModelDesc* top earlier. Bot reporting recorded a small improvement for mn_8022B3A0. A reviewer also flagged a string-literal-to-variable replacement in src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.c as a regression, but that file is not present in the loaded changed-files metadata or raw diff excerpt.

key_files.role: Only file in loaded changed-files metadata and raw diff; contains fn_8022AFEC argument change and mn_8022B3A0 declaration-order changes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8022AFEC changed third mn_8022A440 argument from mn_804A04F0.prev_menu to data->hovered_selection
raw_diff: mn_8022B3A0 moved StaticModelDesc* top = &MenMainConTop_Top and HSD_GObj* gobj earlier in local declarations
decomp-dev bot report: main/melee/mn/mnmain mn_8022B3A0 improved 96.93% to 96.98%

key_files.role: Review-comment path only; reviewer flagged replacing inline asset strings with a variable as a regression, but this path is not included in loaded changed-files metadata or raw diff.

what_changed.description: In fn_8022AFEC, the third argument passed to mn_8022A440 in the shown branch changed from mn_804A04F0.prev_menu to data->hovered_selection.
In mn_8022B3A0, local declarations were reordered: StaticModelDesc* top = &MenMainConTop_Top and HSD_GObj* gobj were placed earlier, while the prior later top declaration was removed.
decomp-dev reported one unmatched-item improvement for main/melee/mn/mnmain, item mn_8022B3A0, from 96.93% to 96.98%.
A review hunk shows an attempted replacement of inline strings for MenMainBack_Top resources with a named variable mnNameNew_803EE38C; reviewer called this a regression.

smart_moves.description: The PR was scoped as an MN directory/subsystem split from a larger branch to make matching improvements easier to review.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Split from #2617 by directory/subsystem so the matching improvements are easier to review

smart_moves.description: The author reported basic slice hygiene: created from origin/master as an isolated path slice and git diff --check passed.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For code-matching PRs, replacing ordinary inline resource or asset string literals with generated/address-style data symbols can be treated as a regression when no data-ownership evidence is provided.
evidence_refs: review_comments: Replacing the string with the variable is a regression as mentioned on other PRs
review hunk: "MenMainBack_Top_joint" and related strings replaced by mnNameNew_803EE38C

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small local declaration-order changes can affect match score, but should be recorded as matching tactics rather than semantic cleanup unless the PR evidence proves source intent.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local declaration order changed in mn_8022B3A0
decomp-dev bot report: mn_8022B3A0 improved 96.93% to 96.98%

naming_conventions.convention: Do not infer that generated/address-style names such as mnNameNew_803EE38C are preferred names for ordinary asset/resource strings; keep inline literals when the PR lacks data-ownership evidence.
Address-style function names such as fn_8022AFEC and mn_8022B3A0 remained unchanged in the shown diff; the slice does not provide evidence for semantic renames.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration ordering/local lifetime steering in mn_8022B3A0: StaticModelDesc* top and HSD_GObj* gobj were moved earlier in the local declaration block.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev bot report: mn_8022B3A0 score improvement
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence shows a score improvement, but not a full match or detailed objdiff rationale; treat as a narrow tactic, not a global style rule.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Semantic-looking argument substitution in fn_8022AFEC from global prev_menu to data->hovered_selection may have been part of matching work.

The review comment references src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.c and includes a diff hunk, but that file is absent from loaded changed-files metadata and raw diff; record it as review evidence, not as a fully inspected changed file.

The PR body's preliminary report is for the full unsplit source branch and explicitly says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative for the slice; only the decomp-dev slice comment is used for the narrow mn_8022B3A0 improvement.

accepted_candidate_records.title: String literals should not be replaced by generated variables in code-matching review without data evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2626, a reviewer flagged replacing inline MenMainBack_Top string literals with mnNameNew_803EE38C as a regression. This reinforces keeping ordinary resource strings inline unless the PR is explicitly scoped for data ownership and provides supporting evidence.
evidence_refs: review hunk showing "MenMainBack_Top_joint" replaced by mnNameNew_803EE38C

accepted_candidate_records.title: mn_8022B3A0 declaration-order adjustment produced a small reported score improvement
accepted_candidate_records.text: The loaded diff for PR #2626 moved StaticModelDesc* top and HSD_GObj* gobj earlier in mn_8022B3A0's local declarations, and the bot reported that mn_8022B3A0 improved from 96.93% to 96.98%. Treat this as narrow evidence that local declaration order/lifetime can matter for this function, not as a general style preference.

source_update_candidates.title: Reviewer example for no string-literal symbol regression
source_update_candidates.text: Add PR #2626 as an example under no-string-literal-symbol-regression/text-before-data-matching: replacing menu resource strings such as "MenMainBack_Top_joint" with an address-style/generated variable such as mnNameNew_803EE38C was reviewed as a regression.
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standards already contain this rule; PR #2626 provides a concrete reviewer-backed example that may be useful as supporting provenance.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's six-file list as the changed-file set for this intake; loaded changed-files metadata and raw diff only substantiate src/melee/mn/mnmain.c.
Do not claim the PR matched mn_8022B3A0; loaded bot evidence reports only a small unmatched-item improvement.
Do not infer reviewer intent beyond the explicit string-to-variable regression comment.
Do not treat the declaration-order movement in mn_8022B3A0 as an accepted global convention.
